Catalog/Cardiovascular/Dafodil Neo Aortic Valve
❤️ CardiovascularREF: DDLN-A

Dafodil Neo Aortic Valve

Dafodil Neo · Heart Valves

Meril Dafodil Neo Aortic Valve is a premium bovine pericardium bioprosthetic valve featuring advanced Triad frame design with Elgiloy alloy wireform for enhanced durability. Available in 17-29mm tissue annulus diameter range with proprietary anti-calcification treatment, ensuring optimal hemodynamic performance and longevity. MR Conditional safety at 1.5T and 3.0T makes it ideal for post-operative imaging requirements. Low profile height (14-18mm) facilitates minimally invasive cardiac surgical procedures in Indian hospitals.

MaterialBovine Pericardium with Elgiloy Alloy Wireform
Frequently Asked Questions

Meril Dafodil Neo Aortic Valve is a premium bovine pericardium bioprosthetic valve featuring advanced Triad frame design with Elgiloy alloy wireform for enhanced durability. Available in 17-29mm tissue annulus diameter range with proprietary anti-calcification treatment, ensuring optimal hemodynamic performance and longevity. MR Conditional safety at 1.5T and 3.0T makes it ideal for post-operative imaging requirements. Low profile height (14-18mm) facilitates minimally invasive cardiac surgical procedures in Indian hospitals.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Dafodil Neo Aortic Valve, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Dafodil Neo Aortic Valve is constructed using Bovine Pericardium with Elgiloy Alloy Wireform, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
